title: API calls returning 500 error
description: When calling /api/v2/orders, intermittent 500 Internal Server Error responses occur, roughly 3 out of every 10 requests fail. Started yesterday afternoon.

title: How to bulk export data
description: Need to export customer order data from the last 3 months, approximately 200,000 records. The admin panel export keeps timing out. Is there another method?

title: Login page loads very slowly
description: Since 8 AM this morning, the login page takes 15-20 seconds to load, sometimes even timing out. Other pages are fine. Browser cache has been cleared, problem persists.

title: Printer cannot connect
description: The 4th floor network printer cannot be connected. Restarting the printer still does not discover the device.

title: Permission settings not taking effect
description: Configured 'Data Analyst' role permissions for 3 users in the admin panel. After saving, users report they still cannot access the analytics dashboard. Have waited 30 minutes.
